rationale: The cited paper is used only in the discussion of limitations/future research, where the author notes the growth of multitier private labels and cites Geyskens et al. (2010) as an example. It does not play a visible role in the paper's core framing, hypothesis development, model design, or empirical analysis of intrayear demand cycles and advertising/pricing effectiveness. Because its function is background context rather than a specific intellectual dependency, this is a mention-only citation.
